## Skill Description
What should this skill do?

## Use Case
When would you use this skill? Example scenario.

## Tools Needed
What tools/APIs would this skill need? (filesystem, browser, HTTP, etc.)

## Reference
Links to APIs, documentation, or similar implementations.
